news.title: The DeepMind trio who built a poker AI are now making money for quant hedge funds
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, is now valued at more than $500 million.

news.title: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.

news.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

news.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

news.title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. The startup's new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

news.title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

news.title: How Grindr’s C.E.O. Adopted A.I.: ‘I Just Imposed It’
news.description: [THE NEW YORK TIMES] George Arison, the gay dating app’s chief executive, is aiming for all code to be eventually written by artificial intelligence, making the company “leaner.”
